titleStmt.title: SII 23.305: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 305. (A.R. No. 305 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ: year 13

summary.p: This is an inscription evidently of Rājarāja III whose Tirumandiravōlai Mīnavaṉ Mūvēndavēḷāṉ and other officers figure as signatories at the end. It is dated in the 138th day of the regnal year, and records an order of the king to issue the uḷvari to the temple granting remission of the taxes on the lands belonging to the temple (tirunāmattukkāṇi) in the surrounding parts of Tiruviḍaimarudūr, in the city itself and in Pirāṭṭinaṅgainallūr, and on which the newly formed street Rājākkaḷ-tambirān- tiruvīdi, tanks, flower gardens and orchards were situated. These lands are stated to be exclusive of 7(1/2) vēli and odd of lands occupied by the temple and its adjuncts which had been exempted from taxes in the 16th year of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa (I) ‘who abolished the tolls.’ It may be noted that this Rājākkaḷ-tambirāṉ-tiruvīdi is also mentioned in No. 288 above of the 16th year of king Kulōttuṅga III as newly formed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravartti koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Uyyak koṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyil patipātamulap paṭṭuṭai pañcācāriyat tevarkaṉmikkum
śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum cikāriyañ ceyvāṉuk kum Ittevarkku Uḷḷūrkkaḷil śrīkoyilun tirumuṟṟamun tirumaṭai viḷākamun tiruttakkuḷamun tirunantavaṉam Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavai
yiṟṟukku cuṅkantavirtta kulottuṅkacoḻa tevarkku patiṉāṟāvatu Aḷavil niṅkalāṉa nilam Eḻaraiye kāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻ Oṉpatu mākkā ṇikku Eṟṟamākat tiruviṭaimarutu Uḷḷūrkkaḷilum nakaram tiruviṭai
marutilum pirāṭṭinaṅkai nallūrilum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilattup putitākac ceyta rājākkaḷ tampirāṉ tiruvitiyum tirttakkuḷamum tiruttoppukkaḷum tiruppaḷḷittāmat tirunantavaṉaṅkaḷum mālait tirunantavaṉaṅ
kaḷum ceṅkaḻunirt tiruoṭaikaḷumāṉa nilamuṟ tiruviṭaimarutiṟ koyiṟ kaṭṭaṇamāy patiṉāṟāvatu Aḷavil niṅkalāṉa nilattukku Eṟṟamākap putitākac ceyta nilamumāṉa nilattukku koyiṟ kaṇakku marutūruṭai yāṉum Ātaṉūruṭai
yāṉum Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi tevatāṉam tiruviṭaimarutu Uḷḷūr kaḷile Irupattumuṉṟe nālumā Araikkāṇi nilamum nakaram tiru viṭaimarutile patiṉaiñcaraiye muṉṟumā nilamum pirāṭṭi naṅkai nallūrile Eḻumākkāṇi nilamum
Iṟaikaṭṭukkuṭalāy varukiṟapaṭi tavirntu patiṉmuṉṟāvatu mutal niṅkalāka nikki variyilārum varikkukūṟu ceyvārkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari tarac coṉṉom Iṉnilam patiṉmuṉṟāvatu mutal niṅkalāka nikkappaṇ ṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraōlai
miṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Ivai kāṅkeyarāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai cetiyarāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai Amarakoṉeḻuttu Ivai villavarāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai cetikularāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai viḻuppātarāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai Ilaṅkeśvara ṉeḻuttu Ivai śrī peṟṟān ṉeḻuttu
Ivai piritiyaṅkkaraiya ṉeḻuttu yāṇṭu 10 3 ḷ 100 3 10 8 . svastiśrī .
Digital edition of SII 23.305 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
